product.desc: KiddoZone official store, a professional kids toy store, aims to bring a smile to a child's face. We provide toys for kids from 0-14 years old. Safe, learning, and affordable toys are what we are prepared for your baby. Hello baby, hello KiddoZone, happy every day
product.highlights:
• A BEGINNING TO KNOW THINGS: You can read these animal tail theme cloth books with your baby, and let your baby get closer to nature and animals. These children's cloth books are also a kind of early educational toys, which can stimulate language ability, reading ability, sensory skills, communication skills, and rich imagination to let your child win at the starting line.
  • BABY'S FIRST LIBRARY: Baby boys or girls love these early learning toys. The bright colors will catch baby's attention, the crinkle feature on both cover pages and squeaker sound improve baby's audio recognition and motor skills, textured animal tails provide sensory interaction. These interactive cloth books help babies engaged for endless hours of fun!
  • ALL FOR BABY'S SAFE: These handmade cloth books are made by BPA-free Polyester, feature washable, no sharp edges, non-toxic, skin-friendly and safe for babies. Also soft fabric surface is comfortable for little hands to grip. Velcrodesigned hanging strap on the top makes this 3d activity book suitable for most strollers, baby fences and cribs.
  • GIFTS FOR BABY BOYS AND GIRLS: The soft activity books are lifelong and never-get-old gifts for infants and toddlers. Whatever age and gender you are planning to gift, our soft baby books are ideal newborn developmental toys for 0 - 12 month infants and 1 - 2 years old, perfect gift for baby showers, birthdays, and Christmas.
  • More product details please check behind pictures

Busy board *1

4pcs/set Lamaze Inspiring Comfortable Rattle Sock Set Baby Sensory Toys Foot-finder Socks Wrist Rattles for Newborns Infants Toy Gift














Features:

Lovable characters inspire pretend play and enhance social skills

Comfortable rattles help stimulate and inspire your baby

Easy to wear, encourages discovery and rewards exploration

Features bright colours, cute faces and enchanting noises

Fully machine-washable to ensure the health and safety of baby


Description:

The Lamaze Garden bug Foot Finders and Wrist Rattles are a great way to start your baby's development. These comfortable rattles are easy to wear, stimulating and inspiring your baby, encouraging discovery, and rewarding exploration. The innovative wrist rattles and foot finders fit comfortably on baby's wrists and ankles; their bright colours, cute faces, and enchanting noises will have baby searching for their hands and feet. The Garden bug Foot Finders and Wrist Rattles are fully machine-washable, ensuring the health and safety of your baby without extra work for you.


Package Included:

2 x Brand New Wrist rattles

2 x Brand New Foot finders


Note:

1.Manual measuring, please allow 1 ~ 3mm error,thank you.

2.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. We guarantee the style is the same as shown in the picture.

detail_html:
• Portable and Lightweight : Its portable and lightweight design makes it easy for children to carry around, perfect for on-the-go learning.






• Wholesale Availability : Available for wholesale, this flashlight is a great option for retailers looking to stock up on educational toys.






• Early Education Tool : This flashlight serves as an early education toy, projecting baby animals to stimulate children's interest in nature.






• Ideal Gift : It makes an ideal gift for children, combining education with entertainment in a fun and interactive way.






• Safe Material : Made from safe materials, this flashlight ensures the well-being of children while they play and learn.

product.desc:
• Portable and Lightweight : Its portable and lightweight design makes it easy for children to carry around, perfect for on-the-go learning.






• Wholesale Availability : Available for wholesale, this flashlight is a great option for retailers looking to stock up on educational toys.






• Early Education Tool : This flashlight serves as an early education toy, projecting baby animals to stimulate children's interest in nature.






• Ideal Gift : It makes an ideal gift for children, combining education with entertainment in a fun and interactive way.






• Safe Material : Made from safe materials, this flashlight ensures the well-being of children while they play and learn.

title: XIONGBUFAN | Educational Felt Board Toys for Toddlers
detail_text: Baby Barrier It serves as a baby barrier, keeping your child safe from potential hazards around the house. Attention Concentration It helps improve your baby's attention and concentration through interactive play. Educational Toy This Fruit Cutting Fun Felt Board is an educational toy that helps children develop their cognitive skills while having fun. Chewable Material Made from chewable material, it's perfect for babies who love to bite and chew on toys. Easy to Clean The toy is easy to clean, ensuring hygiene and safety for your child.
detail_html:
Baby Barrier



It serves as a baby barrier, keeping your child safe from potential hazards around the house.






Attention Concentration



It helps improve your baby's attention and concentration through interactive play.






Educational Toy



This Fruit Cutting Fun Felt Board is an educational toy that helps children develop their cognitive skills while having fun.






Chewable Material



Made from chewable material, it's perfect for babies who love to bite and chew on toys.






Easy to Clean



The toy is easy to clean, ensuring hygiene and safety for your child.

detail_blocks.text: Baby Barrier It serves as a baby barrier, keeping your child safe from potential hazards around the house. Attention Concentration It helps improve your baby's attention and concentration through interactive play. Educational Toy This Fruit Cutting Fun Felt Board is an educational toy that helps children develop their cognitive skills while having fun. Chewable Material Made from chewable material, it's perfect for babies who love to bite and chew on toys. Easy to Clean The toy is easy to clean, ensuring hygiene and safety for your child.

product.desc:
Baby Barrier



It serves as a baby barrier, keeping your child safe from potential hazards around the house.






Attention Concentration



It helps improve your baby's attention and concentration through interactive play.






Educational Toy



This Fruit Cutting Fun Felt Board is an educational toy that helps children develop their cognitive skills while having fun.






Chewable Material



Made from chewable material, it's perfect for babies who love to bite and chew on toys.






Easy to Clean



The toy is easy to clean, ensuring hygiene and safety for your child.

page_json.description: XIONGBUFAN

title: FUNJOY | Baby Toddler Educational Toy
detail_text: Versatile Use Suitable for children from birth to 5 years old, this toy offers a wide range of usage scenarios, from early learning to birthday gifts. Fun Fishing Game The toy features a fun fishing game that not only entertains children but also helps in developing their motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Gender-Inclusive Whether it's for a boy or a girl, this toy caters to both genders, ensuring that every child can enjoy its benefits regardless of their gender. Educational Toy This toy is designed to enhance the cognitive development of children aged 1 to 3 years, making it an ideal educational tool for young minds. Compact Size Its compact size makes it easy to store and carry around, perfect for travel or outdoor play.
detail_html:
Versatile Use

Suitable for children from birth to 5 years old, this toy offers a wide range of usage scenarios, from early learning to birthday gifts.

Fun Fishing Game

The toy features a fun fishing game that not only entertains children but also helps in developing their motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

Gender-Inclusive

Whether it's for a boy or a girl, this toy caters to both genders, ensuring that every child can enjoy its benefits regardless of their gender.

Educational Toy

This toy is designed to enhance the cognitive development of children aged 1 to 3 years, making it an ideal educational tool for young minds.

Compact Size

Its compact size makes it easy to store and carry around, perfect for travel or outdoor play.

detail_blocks.text: Versatile Use Suitable for children from birth to 5 years old, this toy offers a wide range of usage scenarios, from early learning to birthday gifts. Fun Fishing Game The toy features a fun fishing game that not only entertains children but also helps in developing their motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Gender-Inclusive Whether it's for a boy or a girl, this toy caters to both genders, ensuring that every child can enjoy its benefits regardless of their gender. Educational Toy This toy is designed to enhance the cognitive development of children aged 1 to 3 years, making it an ideal educational tool for young minds. Compact Size Its compact size makes it easy to store and carry around, perfect for travel or outdoor play.

brand.name: FUZAO
brand.suggestion: More Baby & Toddler Toys  from FUZAO

product.desc:
Versatile Use

Suitable for children from birth to 5 years old, this toy offers a wide range of usage scenarios, from early learning to birthday gifts.

Fun Fishing Game

The toy features a fun fishing game that not only entertains children but also helps in developing their motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

Gender-Inclusive

Whether it's for a boy or a girl, this toy caters to both genders, ensuring that every child can enjoy its benefits regardless of their gender.

Educational Toy

This toy is designed to enhance the cognitive development of children aged 1 to 3 years, making it an ideal educational tool for young minds.

Compact Size

Its compact size makes it easy to store and carry around, perfect for travel or outdoor play.

page_json.name: FUNJOY | Baby Toddler Educational Toy
page_json.description: FUZAO Unisex Mainland china

title: Electronic English Alphabet Wall Chart Talking ABC Letters 123s Music Poster Educational Learning Toy for Toddler Kids Gifts
detail_text: About this item EDUCATIONAL TOY FOR EARLY CHILDHOOD DEVELOPMENT - Learning the ABCs is the foundation of reading and writing that we will want to start teaching our child early on. Our interactive learning poster is a must-have for toddlers and preschoolers to learn alphabets, number, recognizing animals, fruits. It helps to teach the little ones how to pronounce by starting with the basics of hearing, recognizing the sounds and encouraging them to express words through the quiz time and spelling time. MAKE LEARNING FUN - Engaging, clear and colorful designs and images create a fun learning environment in which young kids can excel. Our amazing wall posters can help to increase their interest towards alphabet words, numbers and music. READ, TOUCH AND LEARN - Touch and hands-on are the best way for little kids to learn and experience as toddlers learn through play and exploration of their environment, they understand best when taking a hands-on approach to learning. Pointing out the letters and numbers, and taking the quizzes is a great way to teach toddlers the alphabets and numbers by making it an engaging learning experience. SING THE SONGS - Singing and dancing with the most popular ABC songs is a great way to help our little ones to learn. When doing an activity like letter recognition, you can sing the ABC song and point to the letter at the same time helping them to recognize the letter name with the letter shape. A PERFECT ADDITION TO YOUR NURSERY OR PLAYROOM - Our interactive ABC wall posters are well made in bold colors and attractive images. They are not only designed to attract and hold the little ones’ attention and provide hours of entertainment and learning, but also a perfect decor to any nursery room or playroom. Warm Tip : 1.Keep away from fire . 2.Batteries Not Included 3.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. We guarantee the style is the same as shown in the pictures. 4.Manual measurement may have an error of 1-2 cm.
detail_html:
About this item

EDUCATIONAL TOY FOR EARLY CHILDHOOD DEVELOPMENT - Learning the ABCs is the foundation of reading and writing that we will want to start teaching our child early on. Our interactive learning poster is a must-have for toddlers and preschoolers to learn alphabets, number, recognizing animals, fruits. It helps to teach the little ones how to pronounce by starting with the basics of hearing, recognizing the sounds and encouraging them to express words through the quiz time and spelling time.
MAKE LEARNING FUN - Engaging, clear and colorful designs and images create a fun learning environment in which young kids can excel. Our amazing wall posters can help to increase their interest towards alphabet words, numbers and music.
READ, TOUCH AND LEARN - Touch and hands-on are the best way for little kids to learn and experience as toddlers learn through play and exploration of their environment, they understand best when taking a hands-on approach to learning. Pointing out the letters and numbers, and taking the quizzes is a great way to teach toddlers the alphabets and numbers by making it an engaging learning experience.
SING THE SONGS - Singing and dancing with the most popular ABC songs is a great way to help our little ones to learn. When doing an activity like letter recognition, you can sing the ABC song and point to the letter at the same time helping them to recognize the letter name with the letter shape.
A PERFECT ADDITION TO YOUR NURSERY OR PLAYROOM - Our interactive ABC wall posters are well made in bold colors and attractive images. They are not only designed to attract and hold the little ones’ attention and provide hours of entertainment and learning, but also a perfect decor to any nursery room or playroom.

Warm Tip :

1.Keep away from fire .
2.Batteries Not Included
3.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. We guarantee the style is the same as shown in the pictures.
4.Manual measurement may have an error of 1-2 cm.

aiTexts: This Electronic English Alphabet Wall Chart is an engaging educational tool for toddlers.
Recommended for ages 0-3 years, it features colorful designs that make learning fun.
Interactive elements help children learn the ABCs, numbers, and animal recognition through touch and sound.
Encourages hands-on learning with quizzes and songs, enhancing memory and pronunciation skills.
Perfect for nurseries or playrooms, it combines entertainment with education, creating a vibrant learning environment.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
About this item

EDUCATIONAL TOY FOR EARLY CHILDHOOD DEVELOPMENT - Learning the ABCs is the foundation of reading and writing that we will want to start teaching our child early on. Our interactive learning poster is a must-have for toddlers and preschoolers to learn alphabets, number, recognizing animals, fruits. It helps to teach the little ones how to pronounce by starting with the basics of hearing, recognizing the sounds and encouraging them to express words through the quiz time and spelling time.
MAKE LEARNING FUN - Engaging, clear and colorful designs and images create a fun learning environment in which young kids can excel. Our amazing wall posters can help to increase their interest towards alphabet words, numbers and music.
READ, TOUCH AND LEARN - Touch and hands-on are the best way for little kids to learn and experience as toddlers learn through play and exploration of their environment, they understand best when taking a hands-on approach to learning. Pointing out the letters and numbers, and taking the quizzes is a great way to teach toddlers the alphabets and numbers by making it an engaging learning experience.
SING THE SONGS - Singing and dancing with the most popular ABC songs is a great way to help our little ones to learn. When doing an activity like letter recognition, you can sing the ABC song and point to the letter at the same time helping them to recognize the letter name with the letter shape.
A PERFECT ADDITION TO YOUR NURSERY OR PLAYROOM - Our interactive ABC wall posters are well made in bold colors and attractive images. They are not only designed to attract and hold the little ones’ attention and provide hours of entertainment and learning, but also a perfect decor to any nursery room or playroom.

Warm Tip :

1.Keep away from fire .
2.Batteries Not Included
3.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. We guarantee the style is the same as shown in the pictures.
4.Manual measurement may have an error of 1-2 cm.

detail_html:
Size: As shown

Brand new and high quality

Type: Color Sorting Sensory Toys

Color: As shown

Material: PVC


Description:

-Squishy Color Sorting Toys: toddler color sorting toys can cultivate children's color recognition skills and relieve adults' stress. Sorting colors by squeezing and pressing rubber beads of different colors and putting them into the correct colors to complete the color matching game.

-Preschool Learning Activities: Squishy fidget toys are designed for preschoolers and contain what young children need to learn, keeping them busy with sorting and matching colors, allowing them to learn while playing.

-Durable and safe: this preschool toys are made of soft material, gel and beads are firmly sealed in the sensory tubes, which can withstand any gripping force without leaking, even if kids or toddlers squeeze them hard, they will not break or leak. It is a safe and effective fidget tool for boys, girls and toddlers.

-Instant Stress Relief: These sensory toys are suitable for adults to release the pressure and this sensory item also specifically meets the special needs of children with autism and ADHD OCD/ADD, which can help them regain control of their emotions.

-Christmas Gifts For Toddlers: These educational toys are great gifts for birthdays, Christmas and other holidays. sensory toys for kids aged 4 5 6 will bring more happiness to your children.

Package Including:

1*Color Sorting Sensory Toys

Notes:

1.Due to the light and monitors effect, colors may have lightly difference.

2.Please allow slightly size errors due to manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding.

page_json.description: Type: Color Sorting Sensory Toys Color: As shown  Material: PVC  Size: As shown  Brand new and high quality  Size: As shown Brand new and high quality Type: Color Sorting Sensory ToysColor: As shown Material: PVC Description: -Squishy Color Sorting Toys:  toddler color sorting toys can cultivate children's color recognition skills and relieve adults' stress. Sorting colors by squeezing and pressing rubber beads of different colors and putting them into the correct colors to complete the color matching game. -Preschool Learning Activities: Squishy fidget toys are designed for preschoolers and contain what young children need to learn, keeping them busy with sorting and matching colors, allowing them to learn while playing. -Durable and safe: this preschool toys are made of soft material, gel and beads are firmly sealed in the sensory tubes, which can withstand any gripping force without leaking, even if kids or toddlers squeeze them hard, they will not break or leak. It is a safe and effective fidget tool for boys, girls and toddlers. -Instant Stress Relief: These sensory toys are suitable for adults to release the pressure and this sensory item also specifically meets the special needs of children with autism and ADHD OCD/ADD, which can help them regain control of their emotions. -Christmas Gifts For Toddlers: These educational toys are great gifts for birthdays, Christmas and other holidays. sensory toys for kids aged 4 5 6 will bring more happiness to your children.  Package Including: 1*Color Sorting Sensory Toys  Notes: 1.Due to the light and monitors effect, colors may have lightly difference. 2.Please allow slightly size errors due to manual measurement. Thank you for your understanding.

title: FUZAO | Educational Baby Phone Toy with Bite-Resistant Design for Girls
detail_text: Realistic Design The realistic phone design encourages role-playing and imaginative play, helping children develop social skills. Portable Size Its compact size makes it easy for children to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment. Durable Material Made from high-quality materials, this toy is durable and safe for babies to chew on, ensuring long-lasting use. Educational Toy This phone toy is an excellent early education tool for children, designed to enhance their cognitive skills through play. Music Feature The toy includes a music feature, providing auditory stimulation and entertainment for children.
detail_html:
Realistic Design



The realistic phone design encourages role-playing and imaginative play, helping children develop social skills.






Portable Size



Its compact size makes it easy for children to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment.






Durable Material



Made from high-quality materials, this toy is durable and safe for babies to chew on, ensuring long-lasting use.






Educational Toy



This phone toy is an excellent early education tool for children, designed to enhance their cognitive skills through play.






Music Feature



The toy includes a music feature, providing auditory stimulation and entertainment for children.

aiTexts: This FUZAO Educational Baby Phone Toy features a realistic design that encourages role-playing and social skill development.
Its compact, portable size is ideal for on-the-go entertainment for toddlers aged 2 and above.
Constructed from durable, bite-resistant materials, it is safe for babies to chew and built for long-lasting use.
The toy includes a music feature that provides auditory stimulation and enhances early cognitive skills through engaging play.

product.desc:
Realistic Design



The realistic phone design encourages role-playing and imaginative play, helping children develop social skills.






Portable Size



Its compact size makes it easy for children to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment.






Durable Material



Made from high-quality materials, this toy is durable and safe for babies to chew on, ensuring long-lasting use.






Educational Toy



This phone toy is an excellent early education tool for children, designed to enhance their cognitive skills through play.






Music Feature



The toy includes a music feature, providing auditory stimulation and entertainment for children.

title: 【Original】 Hungry Caterpillar Toddler Learning Toy Interactive Educational Play Bright Colors
detail_text: Hungry Caterpillar Toy English Picture Books Teaching Aids Felt Toys Open Classes Children Gifts Interactive Teaching Very Hungry Caterpillar Activity Toy Fun Felt Play Felt Board Figures for Toddlers Feature: 1. Educational Tool for Engaging Lessons: Utilize our  hungry caterpillar performance props as a dynamic teaching aid to bring stories like "The Very Hungry Caterpillar" to life in the classroom, captivating children and fostering a love for learning English through interactive storytelling. 2. Interactive Learning Experience: By pairing these  english picture books teaching aids with storybooks, educators can encourage participation and enhance attention levels. The toys provide a hands-on approach to create a more engaging, open, and active classroom environment that encourages self-directed learning and exploration. 3. Visual Storytelling Aid: These  open classes children gifts visually represent storylines, helping children to better understand and retain the content. By seeing the characters and plot elements in a tangible form, students can connect with the story in a deeper and more memorable way. 4. Inspiration for Creativity: Encourage children to engage in role-play and creative play with these very hungry caterpillar activity toy , sparking their imagination and creativity. This type of play is not only fun but also critical for cognitive development and problem-solving skills. 5. Multisensory Educational Experience: Our hungry caterpillar plush toy  provide a multisensory learning opportunity, allowing children to touch, feel, and listen to the stories. This immersive experience aids in comprehensive understanding and reinforces learning outcomes, making each storybook session both educational and enjoyable. Specification: Product Size: 80x80mm/3.14x3.14 in Age: 3-6 Years Old Preschool,6-12 Years Old Age,0-3 Years Old Infants And Toddlers Material: Felt Color: As Shown Note: Due To The Different Monitor And Light Effect, The Actual Color Of The Item Might Be Slightly Different From The Color Showed On The Pictures. Thank You! Please Allow 1-2 CM Measuring Deviation Due To Manual Measurement.
detail_html:
Hungry Caterpillar Toy English Picture Books Teaching Aids Felt Toys Open Classes Children Gifts Interactive Teaching Very Hungry Caterpillar Activity Toy Fun Felt Play Felt Board Figures for Toddlers
Feature:
1. Educational Tool for Engaging Lessons: Utilize our hungry caterpillar performance props as a dynamic teaching aid to bring stories like "The Very Hungry Caterpillar" to life in the classroom, captivating children and fostering a love for learning English through interactive storytelling.
2. Interactive Learning Experience: By pairing these english picture books teaching aids with storybooks, educators can encourage participation and enhance attention levels. The toys provide a hands-on approach to create a more engaging, open, and active classroom environment that encourages self-directed learning and exploration.
3. Visual Storytelling Aid: These open classes children gifts visually represent storylines, helping children to better understand and retain the content. By seeing the characters and plot elements in a tangible form, students can connect with the story in a deeper and more memorable way.
4. Inspiration for Creativity: Encourage children to engage in role-play and creative play with these very hungry caterpillar activity toy, sparking their imagination and creativity. This type of play is not only fun but also critical for cognitive development and problem-solving skills.
5. Multisensory Educational Experience: Our hungry caterpillar plush toy provide a multisensory learning opportunity, allowing children to touch, feel, and listen to the stories. This immersive experience aids in comprehensive understanding and reinforces learning outcomes, making each storybook session both educational and enjoyable.




Specification:
Product Size: 80x80mm/3.14x3.14 in
Age: 3-6 Years Old Preschool,6-12 Years Old Age,0-3 Years Old Infants And Toddlers
Material: Felt
Color: As Shown

Note:
Due To The Different Monitor And Light Effect, The Actual Color Of The Item Might Be Slightly Different From The Color Showed On The Pictures. Thank You!
Please Allow 1-2 CM Measuring Deviation Due To Manual Measurement.

page_json.name: 【Original】 Hungry Caterpillar Toddler Learning Toy Interactive Educational Play Bright Colors
page_json.description: Hungry Caterpillar Toy English Picture Books Teaching Aids Felt Toys Open Classes Children Gifts Interactive Teaching Very Hungry Caterpillar Activity Toy Fun Felt Play Felt Board Figures for Toddlers Feature: 1. Educational Tool for Engaging Lessons: Utilize our hungry caterpillar performance props as a dynamic teaching aid to bring stories like "The Very Hungry Caterpillar" to life in the classroom, captivating children and fostering a love for learning English through interactive storytelling. 2. Interactive Learning Experience: By pairing these english picture books teaching aids with storybooks, educators can encourage participation and enhance attention levels. The toys provide a hands-on approach to create a more engaging, open, and active classroom environment that encourages self-directed learning and exploration. 3. Visual Storytelling Aid: These open classes children gifts visually represent storylines, helping children to better understand and retain the content. By seeing the characters and plot elements in a tangible form, students can connect with the story in a deeper and more memorable way. 4. Inspiration for Creativity: Encourage children to engage in role-play and creative play with these very hungry caterpillar activity toy, sparking their imagination and creativity. This type of play is not only fun but also critical for cognitive development and problem-solving skills. 5. Multisensory Educational Experience: Our hungry caterpillar plush toy provide a multisensory learning opportunity, allowing children to touch, feel, and listen to the stories. This immersive experience aids in comprehensive understanding and reinforces learning outcomes, making each storybook session both educational and enjoyable.    Specification: Product Size: 80x80mm/3.14x3.14 in Age: 3-6 Years Old Preschool,6-12 Years Old Age,0-3 Years Old Infants And Toddlers Material: Felt Color: As Shown  Note: Due To The Different Monitor And Light Effect, The Actual Color Of The Item Might Be Slightly Different From The Color Showed On The Pictures. Thank You! Please Allow 1-2 CM Measuring Deviation Due To Manual Measurement.

title: FUZAO | Talking Baby Toy Yellow Duck 0-1 Year
detail_text: Comfortable Material Made from soft, comfortable material, this toy is safe for babies to cuddle and play with. Interactive Design The toy features an interactive design that encourages children to engage in play, making learning a joyful experience. Cute Yellow Duck Design The cute yellow duck design is sure to capture the hearts of young children, making it a hit with kids. Portable Size Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment for your little one. Hypoallergenic The toy is hypoallergenic, ensuring it's safe for even the most sensitive skin.

page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  Comfortable Material   Made from soft, comfortable material, this toy is safe for babies to cuddle and play with.    Interactive Design   The toy features an interactive design that encourages children to engage in play, making learning a joyful experience.    Cute Yellow Duck Design   The cute yellow duck design is sure to capture the hearts of young children, making it a hit with kids.    Portable Size   Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment for your little one.    Hypoallergenic   The toy is hypoallergenic, ensuring it's safe for even the most sensitive skin.     </body></html>

title: SIRENXI Cognition Baby Projector Torch 24 Patterns Early Educational Children Luminous Toys Creative Logical Thinking Training Cartoon Flashlight Projection Baby/Kids/Children/Toddler
detail_text: Product list:1PC Kids Flashlight+3pcs Cards(Patterns and colors are random) Material: ABS Color: blue/green Applicable age: 4 to 6 years old Product Name: Kids Flashlight Size: About 11.5*4cm(4.53*1.57in) Battery: 3pcs button cells Descriptions: 1. The image of the Kids' Flashlight is clear and can be made larger or smaller as the flashlight moves. 2. Kids Flashlight is simple to use, just insert the slide, turn on the flashlight, and project it onto the wall for you to image and use easily. How to use: 1. Pull out the insulating sheet 2. Insert the projector film into the card slot 3. Push the button to turn on the projection switch 4. Rotate the film to switch screens Notes: Please allow 0.5cm/0.20in error due to manual measurement. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item, hope you can understand.
detail_html:
Product list:1PC Kids Flashlight+3pcs Cards(Patterns and colors are random)

Material: ABS

Color: blue/green

Applicable age: 4 to 6 years old

Product Name: Kids Flashlight

Size: About 11.5*4cm(4.53*1.57in)

Battery: 3pcs button cells


Descriptions:

1. The image of the Kids' Flashlight is clear and can be made larger or smaller as the flashlight moves.

2. Kids Flashlight is simple to use, just insert the slide, turn on the flashlight, and project it onto the wall for you to image and use easily.

How to use:

1. Pull out the insulating sheet

2. Insert the projector film into the card slot

3. Push the button to turn on the projection switch

4. Rotate the film to switch screens

Notes:

Please allow 0.5cm/0.20in error due to manual measurement.

Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item, hope you can understand.

title: REDAIREDA 128 Patterns Children Projector Flashlight Early Education 16 Cards Flashlight Projector Toy Creativity Toy Kid Gift Projection Torch Lamp Baby Puzzle Teaching
detail_text: Power Supply Mode:Button Battery Power supplies:AG13*3 Age : 3 + Package Includes:1pc Children Projector Flashlight+16 pcs Cards/128 Pattems Size:12*5cm(4.72*1.97in) Color:Blue/Pink/Purple Material:Plastic This fantastic projector torch projects amazing images around your room.View the fascinating images on your walls and ceilings a great bedtime to make going to sleep more fun. The torch comes with three slide discs with a total of 24 colour photographs. Swap and change the slides easily by pulling back the plastic flap and inserting the chosen disc then rotate the disc round to view the fantastic colour images which project up to one meter wide.Images are easily focused by turning the lens head. This product can be used as a normal torch without the slides in place and is great for keeping on bedside tables to give comfort to children during the night. A perfect, fun yet educational gift for boys and girls . Key Features: Our projector have more images and more vivid colors.128/ different pictures and 16 sets of themes,open it and let your child enter the magical world! Slide the lens to adjust the sharpness,It is recommended to use a dark room with a projection distance of 50-150 cm to create clear and precise images. The projected images at different distances will look different Made of high quality ABS environmentally friendly non-toxic materials, and the smooth edges will not harm the children's small hands. (button Batteries are not included) It is very energy efficient. Not only can be used as a projection, but also can be used as a flashlight, both indoors and outdoors. Note: Please allow 1-3cm (0.4-1.18") difference due to manual measurement and slight color variation for different display setting Thank you for your understanding, nice day!

This fantastic projector torch projects amazing images around your room.View the fascinating images on your walls and ceilings a great bedtime to make going to sleep more fun. The torch comes with three slide discs with a total of 24 colour photographs. Swap and change the slides easily by pulling back the plastic flap and inserting the chosen disc then rotate the disc round to view the fantastic colour images which project up to one meter wide.Images are easily focused by turning the lens head. This product can be used as a normal torch without the slides in place and is great for keeping on bedside tables to give comfort to children during the night. A perfect, fun yet educational gift for boys and girls .

Key Features:

Our projector have more images and more vivid colors.128/ different pictures and 16 sets of themes,open it and let your child enter the magical world!

Slide the lens to adjust the sharpness,It is recommended to use a dark room with a projection distance of 50-150 cm to create clear and precise images. The projected images at different distances will look different

Made of high quality ABS environmentally friendly non-toxic materials, and the smooth edges will not harm the children's small hands. (button Batteries are not included) It is very energy efficient. Not only can be used as a projection, but also can be used as a flashlight, both indoors and outdoors.

Note:

Please allow 1-3cm (0.4-1.18") difference due to manual measurement and slight color variation for different display setting

Thank you for your understanding, nice day!

title: XIDIQI | Moving and Singing Baby Crawl Learning Toy
detail_text: Interactive Features The toy features interactive elements such as singing and talking, which engage babies and enhance their learning experience. Early Education Toy This toy is designed for early education, helping babies develop essential skills like crawling, sitting up, and speaking. Electric Powered Powered by electricity, this toy offers consistent and reliable performance, ensuring hours of fun for your baby. Portable Design Its portable design makes it easy to carry around, allowing your baby to enjoy learning and playing anytime, anywhere. Suitable for 6-12 Months Specifically designed for babies aged 6 to 12 months, this toy is ideal for their developmental stage.

brand.name: XIDIQI
brand.suggestion: More Baby & Toddler Toys  from XIDIQI

product.desc:
Interactive Features



The toy features interactive elements such as singing and talking, which engage babies and enhance their learning experience.






Early Education Toy



This toy is designed for early education, helping babies develop essential skills like crawling, sitting up, and speaking.






Electric Powered



Powered by electricity, this toy offers consistent and reliable performance, ensuring hours of fun for your baby.






Portable Design



Its portable design makes it easy to carry around, allowing your baby to enjoy learning and playing anytime, anywhere.






Suitable for 6-12 Months



Specifically designed for babies aged 6 to 12 months, this toy is ideal for their developmental stage.

title: QIMINGXING | Educational Press-and-Crawl Baby Toy 6 Months
detail_text: Early Education Toy This toy is designed for early education, helping babies develop their cognitive skills through play. Entertaining Feature The toy features a bell that rings when pressed, capturing your baby's attention and keeping them entertained. Comfortable Material Made from soft, comfortable materials, this toy provides a safe and enjoyable playing experience for your child. Stimulating Design The toy's stimulating design encourages babies to press and play, promoting motor skill development. Age Appropriate Specifically designed for babies aged 0-12 months, it's the perfect companion for their early developmental stages.
detail_html:
Early Education Toy



This toy is designed for early education, helping babies develop their cognitive skills through play.






Entertaining Feature



The toy features a bell that rings when pressed, capturing your baby's attention and keeping them entertained.






Comfortable Material



Made from soft, comfortable materials, this toy provides a safe and enjoyable playing experience for your child.






Stimulating Design



The toy's stimulating design encourages babies to press and play, promoting motor skill development.






Age Appropriate



Specifically designed for babies aged 0-12 months, it's the perfect companion for their early developmental stages.

brand.name: QIMINGXING
brand.suggestion: More Baby & Toddler Toys  from QIMINGXING

product.desc:
Early Education Toy



This toy is designed for early education, helping babies develop their cognitive skills through play.






Entertaining Feature



The toy features a bell that rings when pressed, capturing your baby's attention and keeping them entertained.






Comfortable Material



Made from soft, comfortable materials, this toy provides a safe and enjoyable playing experience for your child.






Stimulating Design



The toy's stimulating design encourages babies to press and play, promoting motor skill development.






Age Appropriate



Specifically designed for babies aged 0-12 months, it's the perfect companion for their early developmental stages.

page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  Early Education Toy   This toy is designed for early education, helping babies develop their cognitive skills through play.    Entertaining Feature   The toy features a bell that rings when pressed, capturing your baby's attention and keeping them entertained.    Comfortable Material   Made from soft, comfortable materials, this toy provides a safe and enjoyable playing experience for your child.    Stimulating Design   The toy's stimulating design encourages babies to press and play, promoting motor skill development.    Age Appropriate   Specifically designed for babies aged 0-12 months, it's the perfect companion for their early developmental stages.     </body></html>

title: BABYSHOME | Rotating Rainbow Stackable Early Educational Toy
detail_text: Interactive Design The interactive design of the toy encourages children to engage in play, fostering creativity and problem-solving skills. Ideal for Toddlers Specifically designed for toddlers aged 1-3, this toy is the perfect size and weight for little hands. Versatile Fun With its colorful rainbow theme, this toy offers endless fun and entertainment for young children. Easy to Use Designed for ease of use, this toy can be easily assembled and disassembled, making it convenient for parents and children alike. Safe Material Made from safe, non-toxic materials, this toy ensures the well-being of your child while they play.
detail_html:
Interactive Design



The interactive design of the toy encourages children to engage in play, fostering creativity and problem-solving skills.






Ideal for Toddlers



Specifically designed for toddlers aged 1-3, this toy is the perfect size and weight for little hands.






Versatile Fun



With its colorful rainbow theme, this toy offers endless fun and entertainment for young children.






Easy to Use



Designed for ease of use, this toy can be easily assembled and disassembled, making it convenient for parents and children alike.






Safe Material



Made from safe, non-toxic materials, this toy ensures the well-being of your child while they play.

brand.suggestion: More Baby & Toddler Toys  from BABYSHOME

product.desc:
Interactive Design



The interactive design of the toy encourages children to engage in play, fostering creativity and problem-solving skills.






Ideal for Toddlers



Specifically designed for toddlers aged 1-3, this toy is the perfect size and weight for little hands.






Versatile Fun



With its colorful rainbow theme, this toy offers endless fun and entertainment for young children.






Easy to Use



Designed for ease of use, this toy can be easily assembled and disassembled, making it convenient for parents and children alike.






Safe Material



Made from safe, non-toxic materials, this toy ensures the well-being of your child while they play.

product.desc:
5PCS Finger Puppet Toy Set

Packing:opp bag for the set

Package:5pcs per set

Option: 12 different set for option

Product Feature:

BATH TIME ESSENTIAL: Perfectly playful companion for your child’s bath time. Completely waterproof and dries quickly.

EDUCATIONAL: Excellent for helping teach your child colors, counting, and more!

PARTIES & HOLIDAYS: Makes for great party favors, stocking stuffers, Easter egg fillers, basket filler and a great gift, too!

SOFT & DURABLE: Made of 100% latex-free plastic that is thick and durable, playtime after playtime.

FAVORITE CHARACTERS: 5-Pack includes Baby Shark, Grandpa Shark, Grandma Shark, Mommy Shark, and Daddy Shark.

Note:

Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item.

There maybe a slight error due to different measurements.

detail_text: Specifications SKU2389805576_SGAMZ-14025642009Music & Sound TypeBaby Music BoxBatteriesNoMaterial CompositionABS,plasticRecommended Age0-3 yearsBaby Recommended Age0-3Mths Highlights Designed for infants up to 12 months, this baby toy combines a rattle, teether, and hand bell to engage your toddler's senses. Crafted from safe ABS plastic, it offers a durable, non-toxic option for sensory training and oral comfort during teething. page_json.name: [SG SELLER] Toddler Play Mat & Baby Gym Fitness Baby Play Mat Toddler Gym Toy with Music Keyboard toys
page_json.description: Baby Toys 6 to 12 Months: This is the perfect gym mat for babies to learn and play. Baby Feeding Floor Mat: Non-skid floor mat can be wiped clean with a damp cloth, so your baby stays clean and hygienic while playing. Playing Mat for Kids: The baby play mat is made of a light-weight material with a smooth surface that won't hurt your baby's tender skin. It can be used as a play mat or a keyboard. Children Playing Mat: The baby play mat has a music function, allowing your baby to play with their favorite music. Baby Tummy Time Mat: The tummy time mat is designed to keep your baby tummy in and out of the way, allowing your baby to focus on the baby's muscles to play, while also reducing the risk of irritation or discomfort. Helps to Develop Brain Cognitive through Toys on the play mat. Safe for Kids, Soft Smooth Surface to ensure safety. with varies music song. Recommended to lay on soft surface such as bed. Materials: Soft ABS Materials. Product size: 57cm*75cm*43cm. Packaging Size: 45.

title: XIONGBUFAN | Windmill Teething Rotating Toy for Baby High Chair
detail_text: Suction Cup Design The suction cup design allows the toy to securely attach to tables, providing stability and preventing it from falling off during meal times. Educational Toy This baby stroller toy is an excellent educational tool, promoting early learning and cognitive development through play. Interactive Windmill The interactive windmill feature engages babies, encouraging them to explore and interact with their environment. Portable and Lightweight Its lightweight design makes it easy to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment for your baby. Attractive Visuals The vibrant colors and rotating design of the windmill attract babies' attention, making meal times more enjoyable.
detail_html:
Suction Cup Design



The suction cup design allows the toy to securely attach to tables, providing stability and preventing it from falling off during meal times.






Educational Toy



This baby stroller toy is an excellent educational tool, promoting early learning and cognitive development through play.






Interactive Windmill



The interactive windmill feature engages babies, encouraging them to explore and interact with their environment.






Portable and Lightweight



Its lightweight design makes it easy to carry around, perfect for on-the-go entertainment for your baby.






Attractive Visuals



The vibrant colors and rotating design of the windmill attract babies' attention, making meal times more enjoyable.

title: XIONGBUFAN | Montessori Baby Busy Book Felt Books Educational Sticker Toy
detail_text: Creative DIY Activity The toy encourages creative DIY activities, allowing children to express their imagination and creativity while learning. Portable and Lightweight Its lightweight and portable design makes it easy to carry around, perfect for travel or on-the-go playtime. Tear-and-Paste Design The unique tear-and-paste design encourages fine motor skill development as your child engages with the book, enhancing their dexterity and coordination. Sturdy Material Made from durable felt material, this baby book is tear-resistant and safe for young children to play with, ensuring long-lasting fun. Suitable for Infants Specifically designed for infants, this toy is safe and suitable for children aged 0-3 years, providing hours of entertainment and learning.
detail_html:
Creative DIY Activity



The toy encourages creative DIY activities, allowing children to express their imagination and creativity while learning.






Portable and Lightweight



Its lightweight and portable design makes it easy to carry around, perfect for travel or on-the-go playtime.






Tear-and-Paste Design



The unique tear-and-paste design encourages fine motor skill development as your child engages with the book, enhancing their dexterity and coordination.






Sturdy Material



Made from durable felt material, this baby book is tear-resistant and safe for young children to play with, ensuring long-lasting fun.






Suitable for Infants



Specifically designed for infants, this toy is safe and suitable for children aged 0-3 years, providing hours of entertainment and learning.

title: TONGMUXING | Educational Intellectual Building Blocks for Babies Shape Matching Toys
detail_text: Educational Toy This Montessori early education toy is designed to stimulate the cognitive development of infants and toddlers, making it an excellent choice for parents looking to enhance their child's learning experience. Gender-specific Ideal for boys, this toy not only entertains but also helps in developing gender-specific skills and interests, making it a perfect gift for baby showers or birthdays. Age-appropriate Specifically tailored for children aged 0 to 3 years, this toy ensures that it is both safe and engaging for young minds, fostering a love for learning from an early age. Gift-worthy With its charming design and educational benefits, this toy makes for a thoughtful and practical gift for any occasion, ensuring a smile on the recipient's face. Shape Recognition The toy's focus on shape recognition aids in the development of visual-spatial skills, an essential component of early childhood education.
detail_html:
Educational Toy



This Montessori early education toy is designed to stimulate the cognitive development of infants and toddlers, making it an excellent choice for parents looking to enhance their child's learning experience.






Gender-specific



Ideal for boys, this toy not only entertains but also helps in developing gender-specific skills and interests, making it a perfect gift for baby showers or birthdays.






Age-appropriate



Specifically tailored for children aged 0 to 3 years, this toy ensures that it is both safe and engaging for young minds, fostering a love for learning from an early age.






Gift-worthy



With its charming design and educational benefits, this toy makes for a thoughtful and practical gift for any occasion, ensuring a smile on the recipient's face.






Shape Recognition



The toy's focus on shape recognition aids in the development of visual-spatial skills, an essential component of early childhood education.
